title: trace-render input spec
description:
Inputs to ``trace-render`` — EXACTLY ONE selector shape.

* ``scope_kind`` + ``scope_id`` — the DIRECT point lookup (Class C): read
  ``.hpc/traces/<scope_kind>/<scope_id>/task-<task>.jsonl`` verbatim.
* ``cmd_sha`` — the REFERENCE lookup (Class B): the newest run whose sidecar
  records this ``cmd_sha`` (parameter identity), then its run-scope trace.
* ``profile`` — the REFERENCE lookup by the sidecar's literal ``profile``
  label: the newest run carrying it (``latest-by-profile``, A7 Class B).

``task`` selects which per-task trace file (single-task local/audit runs use
``task-0``). ``markdown`` toggles the rendered view string in the result.

scope_kind.description: Trace store scope kind for the DIRECT point lookup (with scope_id).
scope_kind.title: Scope Kind

scope_id.description: Trace store scope id for the DIRECT point lookup (with scope_kind).
scope_id.title: Scope Id

task.description: Per-task trace file index (single-task runs use task-0).
task.title: Task

cmd_sha.description: REFERENCE lookup: newest run matching this cmd_sha (Class B).
cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha

profile.description: REFERENCE lookup: newest run carrying this sidecar profile label (Class B).
profile.title: Profile

markdown.description: Include the code-rendered markdown views in the result.
markdown.title: Markdown
